name: Huevos La Calera
description: The company is a leading manufacturer and marketer of eggs in Peru, boasting a network of 5 million laying hens that ensures the delivery of fresh and high-quality eggs.

name: Rose Acre Farms
description: Rose Acre Farms is a dedicated producer of shell eggs and egg products, emphasizing exceptional quality and animal welfare. Their streamlined production ensures a consistent supply of a wide range of eggs, making them a trusted vendor in the industry.

name: Michael Foods
description: Michael Foods specializes in value-added eggs, offering a variety of wholesome egg products, including traditional, cage-free, and organic options. Their innovative food offerings are designed to enhance food safety, extend shelf life, and simplify preparation for foodservice kitchens and manufacturers.

name: Burnbrae Farms
description: Burnbrae Farms is a prominent Canadian producer of shell eggs and egg products, emphasizing partnerships with local farmers to ensure the availability of nutritious and affordable eggs. Their diverse range includes various types of eggs, ensuring options for different preferences and dietary needs.

name: DAVA Foods
description: DAVA Foods highlights its extensive product range, specifically focusing on eggs, which aligns with their vision and values.

name: Al Ain Farms
description: Al Ain Farms is a prominent integrated dairy company in the UAE that offers a variety of products, including eggs.

name: Eggschain
description: Eggschain is a Biotech/Healthcare Technology company that focuses on improving reproductive success through innovative solutions in the IVF and cryogenic preservation industries. Their patented, blockchain-integrated tracking system enhances process efficiency and data security, providing valuable support during fertility diagnosis and treatments.

name: Happy Egg
description: The company is a Free Range egg producer that emphasizes the positive impact of intentional choices, particularly in the care of their hens and the quality of their eggs. They partner with small family farmers to ensure that their hens thrive, resulting in eggs with rich golden yolks.

name: Daybreak Foods, Inc.
description: Daybreak Foods produces millions of eggs daily, primarily processing them into liquid form for the food service and retail industries. With over 19 million laying hens, the company is a key supplier to major food-production companies, emphasizing a commitment to safety and ethical practices.

name: C & P BIRD BROS. LIMITED
description: The company, Bird Bros Eggs, emphasizes their commitment to quality eggs and the well-being of the hens that lay them. They also provide a variety of delicious recipes and serving suggestions for egg lovers.
